## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (roles, agents, scripts, examples)

## Checklist

- [ ] `make validate-examples` passes
- [ ] If new role: updated `settings-schema.json`, `roles/role-definitions.md`, `map.py`, `skill-navigate.py`
- [ ] If new agent: updated `convert.py`, `adapters/`, `settings-schema.json`
- [ ] If schema change: bumped version in schema `$id`
- [ ] No external dependencies added to scripts
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
